{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114470364370BA588A871652D21"}"},"total":860},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7446346143720915774","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"搞笑幽默，特别是小黄把元宵当妈妈这个有意思，还有小黄的鼻涕泡，还有小黄喜欢在别的动物身上撒它的灵尿，总之听着很有趣，每章的环节很紧凑"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733741668,"group_id":"7319809270654962750","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"80后","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny6q3odZ3ztIo5PjSlJqRmkD4nqKWxTfwGWH4Gtc49Aq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/85dbc0d8d38a4abb974604280b3183ea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619084&x-signature=F9XLcaa48c9u6aW5B3d6oWguWtM%3D","user_id":"1160694162011872","user_name":"我铁蛋的主人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1160694162011872","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7319809270654962750","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑轻松+升级灵石+提纯丹药+幽默修仙+凡人流+无系统】你个老六，竟然能升级灵石+提纯丹药？从实招来就不打你！山村少年元宵，机缘巧合救下仙界神偷，靠着厚脸皮抢到逆天宝物天启珠，从此成为修仙土豪，赚钱升级那都不算事！且获得一个神奇的仙灵神通用小世界，从此开启搞笑修仙之旅。带着一飞虎一金貂2只无厘头坑爹惹事灵兽，靠着耍滑头、刮地三尺、勇敢和机智，从凡人小子一步步走向修仙界巅峰，搞笑轻松修仙登顶人间界五大洲。厚脸损友一大堆，修仙糗事接连不断，先把人笑死，再把人笑活！
随着修真实力和眼界的提高，逐渐发现仙界及妖族一些人的惊天阴谋，且看元宵如何大闹仙界九重天，斗智斗勇大杀四方，搞笑轻松干翻仙界！
如果你想笑中带泪，那就请进来看！
搞笑轻松为主调，幽默修仙是本色！
传统玄幻and奇幻仙侠，东方玄幻凡人流修仙。

nfo_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":40,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":56860,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22000},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1714642870,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7428974681709151001","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节和人物很幽默，比如元宵小金小黄一家三口，三化，小胖子，都很搞笑。最感动的就是兄弟情，老哥，徐侠，混元子等等。还有几段小伙伴之间的故事，每一段都那么细节感人，几个小伙伴各有特色，谁也代替不了谁，读到的时候，感到她们每个人都是活灵活现，像要从画面里走出来一样。这本书一点都不虐，读起来感觉到开心和温暖，饱含情义但又如沐春风，很轻松。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729697832,"group_id":"7319809270654962750","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106020971746871"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7319809270654962750","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1566"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读167小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":331514,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":599462,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7426358651711488793","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实很搞笑，一个赖皮少年，加两个喜欢互掐的赖皮灵兽，这个组合蛮搞笑的，小金超萌超可爱，小黄超熊超耍赖，没事就互掐，有外敌就一致对外。
喜欢看小金展示寻宝绝技，喜欢看情感大师黄显摆。喜欢看三化这样的无厘头损友。
喜欢幽默，喜欢笑的读者，可以看一下。这是一本轻松幽默的搞笑修仙小说。","text_exts":[{"e":136,"s":132,"text":"搞笑修仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%90%9E%E7%AC%91%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407562471652D21%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227426358651711488793%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227319809270654962750%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%90%9E%E7%AC%91%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729088542,"group_id":"7319809270654962750","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4CRAKFvNsZV8JD30rC/ONY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"106020971746871","user_name":"璐璐小新"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106020971746871","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":9,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7319809270654962750","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑轻松+升级灵石+提纯丹药+幽默修仙+凡人流+无系统】你个老六，竟然能升级灵石+提纯丹药？从实招来就不打你！山村少年元宵，机缘巧合救下仙界神偷，靠着厚脸皮抢到逆天宝物天启珠，从此成为修仙土豪，赚钱升级那都不算事！且获得一个神奇的仙灵神通用小世界，从此开启搞笑修仙之旅。带着一飞虎一金貂2只无厘头坑爹惹事灵兽，靠着耍滑头、刮地三尺、勇敢和机智，从凡人小子一步步走向修仙界巅峰，搞笑轻松修仙登顶人间界五大洲。厚脸损友一大堆，修仙糗事接连不断，先把人笑死，再把人笑活！
